decisions: ACCEPT: PROCESS-001 satisfies the task acceptance criteria for a gated Autonomous Goal Mode process overlay.

AUTONOMOUS-GOAL-MODE-001 is documented as Accepted with product-owner approval source and explicitly does not alter product, platform, simulation, save-format, historical-content, Roadmap, or architecture decisions.
PROJECT_STATUS.md received only a concise process-mode status/link update.
The original handoff ZIP, checksum, SHA256SUMS, VALIDATION_REPORT, provenance files, and accepted ADR paths are unchanged.
risks: Autonomous continuation still relies on future lead_orchestrator sessions consistently enforcing diff-scope, tests, handoff validation, and Human Gates.
Thread IDs remain session-local hints after restart; persisted handoffs, task JSON, git status, and goal-mode state must remain the recovery source of truth.
requested_action: Lead_orchestrator may run integration gates for PROCESS-001 and decide whether to advance the task from REVIEW to ACCEPTED.
